summary.zh: Anthropic 文本模型绑定。在 text 通道上声明 Anthropic 厂商的能力清单与「档位 → 模型」映射:reasoning 走 opus、draft 走 sonnet、summarize 走 haiku,让 Studio 里不同档位的任务自动用合适的 Claude 模型。本插件只声明映射,实际 HTTP 调用由 server 的 text 通道统一调度。
summary.en: The Anthropic text model binding. On the text channel it declares the Anthropic vendor's capability list and a tier→model mapping: reasoning→opus, draft→sonnet, summarize→haiku, so each tier of task in Studio automatically uses the right Claude model. The plugin only declares the mapping; the actual HTTP is routed by the server's text channel.

body.zh:
text 通道的 Anthropic 厂商绑定
档位映射:reasoning→opus / draft→sonnet / summarize→haiku
body.en:
Anthropic vendor binding on the text channel
Tiers: reasoning→opus / draft→sonnet / summarize→haiku

body.zh: 面板管理 → 模型绑定 → text 通道;HTTP 由 server 调度
body.en: Admin → model bindings → text channel; HTTP routed by the server
